description:
autofs allows automatic mounting of devices, typically including CD/DVDs and USB drives. The autofs package can be removed with the following command: 
 $ sudo dnf remove autofs
rationale:
With automounting enabled anyone with physical access could attach a USB drive or
disc and have its contents available in the filesystem even if they lacked permissions to
mount it themselves.
ocil:
The autofs package can be removed with the following command: 
 $ sudo dnf remove autofs
title: Remove autofs Package
